---
title: "Business Intelligence & Analytics Portfolio"
---


## Hi, I’m Yusuf.
I’m a Business Intelligence and Data Analytics professional with **6+ years of experience** delivering reporting, data integration, and analytics solutions across telecommunications, construction, and manufacturing. I’m currently completing a **Master of Business Analytics at Monash University** as an **Australia Awards Scholar**.

**Target roles (Dubai • Malaysia • Jakarta):**
- BI / Analytics Manager
- Senior BI Analyst
- Data & Reporting Lead
- Analytics Translator (business-to-data)

---

## What I do (in one sentence)
I help organisations turn messy operational data into trusted reporting, decision-ready metrics, and scalable analytics workflows.

---

## What you’ll find here
- **Recruiter-friendly project summaries** (what problem, what I built, what impact)
- Links to **technical GitHub repositories** (reproducible code, READMEs)
- My **ASP initiative**: practical and ethical analytics learning modules for Indonesian professionals and students

---

## Featured projects
### 1) Traveller Insight Dashboard (R Shiny)
Interactive dashboard showing travel trends with filters, maps, and automated insights.  
**Tools:** R, Shiny, ggplot2, data wrangling, reproducible workflow  
**Links:** GitHub repo • Live demo (if available)

### 2) Analytics Product & Dashboards (Tableau / BI)
Selected examples of executive reporting, market insights dashboards, and governance practices (case-based summaries).

> See the full list on the **Projects** page.
